title: BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Limitada | Bacardi 12 Year Rum | Rich and Complex Aged Rum | BACARDÍ Global
clean_text: BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Limitada | Bacardi 12 Year Rum | Rich and Complex Aged Rum | BACARDÍ Global OUR RUMS OUR RUMS White Rum BACARDÍ CARTA BLANCA Flavors Flavors Range Spiced BACARDÍ Spiced Dark Rum BACARDÍ Carta Oro BACARDÍ Carta Negra BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Diez BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Limitada ready to enjoy BACARDÍ x coca-cola Ready to Drink cocktails Ready to Serve cocktails BACARDÍ Coquito View all our rums Cocktails Experiences Experiences Casa BACARDÍ Puerto Rico Visit the World’s largest premium rum distillery. SUSTAINABILITY Our World FAQS COCKTAILS LIMITADA NEAT RARE RUM BLEND BACARDÍ GRAN RESERVA LIMITADA A blend of rare rum reserves results in dry vanilla and dark fruit notes that lead into a long, oaky, smooth finish. LIMITLESS FLAVOR Tasting Notes Rich and complex. Smooth notes of butterscotch and dried fruit melt away to a long, dry finish. Nose Almond and vanilla Palate Dried raisins and chocolate Finish Soft oak and raisin BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Limitada is a blend of scarce rum stocks, including some of our oldest. OUR RECOMMENDED RUMS LIKE THIS? TRY THESE If you enjoy this rum, here’s our recommendations of other BACARDĺ rums we think you’ll like VIEW ALL OUR RUMS BACARDÍ CARTA ORO BACARDÍ SPICED BACARDÍ AÑEJO CUATRO BACARDÍ RESERVA OCHO BACARDÍ RESERVA DIEZ VIEW ALL OUR RUMS EXPLORE THE ANGEL'S SHARE Under the warmth of the Caribbean sun, some golden liquid vanishes to the heavens. Michael B. Jordan’s cinematic film explores the angels’ love of BACARDÍ. DISCOVER MORE MERCHANDISE GET KITTED OUT Glasses. Squeezers. Cocktail kits. Discover everything you need to create standout BACARDÍ cocktails. SHOP NOW FAQ CURIOUS ABOUT RUM? WHAT IS AGED RUM? Rum can be aged anywhere from one year upwards. Aging rum can add additional complexity to its flavor and mouthfeel. WHAT IS THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN DARK, GOLD AND WHITE RUM? Rum is a wonderfully complex and diverse spirit. Color can give us clues about time spent aging or the flavors that might be found within. Dark can be bold, sweet (or dry) and even smoky, gold is rich and soothing, and white is smooth, subtle and often refreshing. But color can be misleading. The best way to truly understand a rum is to taste it for yourself. HOW DO YOU MAKE RUM? Rum is made using only three ingredients: molasses from sugarcane, yeast and water. Ingredients are fermented, then distilled, aged, filtered and blended. metadata.description: A smooth and delightful rum from the BACARDÍ Premium range, Gran Reserva Limitada is perfect to sip and savor. Each golden glass delivers a medley of warm flavors.
